import React, { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import {
Home, Users, School, BookOpen, BarChart3, CalendarCheck, LogOut,
UploadCloud, Link2, Plus, X, ChevronLeft, GraduationCap, KeyRound,
Star, Search, FileText, Video, Image as ImageIcon, FileSpreadsheet,
Presentation, Music, ExternalLink, Check, Clock, TrendingUp, Award,
Menu as MenuIcon
} from "lucide-react";
import {
BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer,
LineChart, Line, PieChart, Pie, Cell
} from "recharts";

const LOGO = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
DESIGN TOKENS
Primary: deep elegant purple (#3D1856 / #6E2C8C)
Accent: warm pink-gold (#C9982E / #E8C874)
Base: warm ivory (#FBF8F3)
Signature motif: 8-point Islamic star (rub el hizb), echoing
the foundation logo's star marks — used as dividers & bullets.
--------------------------------------------------------- */

const CSS = `
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,500;9..144,600;9..144,700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

.ast-root { font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; background:#FBF8F3; color:#241534; min-height:100vh; }
.ast-display { font-family:'Fraunces', serif; }

.ast-star { display:inline-block; }

.ast-btn { border:none; cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit; transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease, background .15s ease; }
.ast-btn:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

.ast-btn-primary { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4A1F6B,#2E1245); color:#F7EFDD; }
.ast-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(74,31,107,0.35); transform: translateY(-2px); }

.ast-btn-gold { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E8C874,#C9982E); color:#2E1245; }
.ast-btn-gold:hover { box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(201,152,46,0.4); transform: translateY(-2px); }

.ast-btn-outline { background:transparent; border:1.5px solid #6E2C8C; color:#4A1F6B; }
.ast-btn-outline:hover { background:#4A1F6B0d; }

.ast-card { background:#fff; border-radius:20px; border:1px solid #EFE6D8; }
.ast-shadow { box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(46,18,69,0.06); }

.ast-sidebar { background:linear-gradient(180deg,#2E1245,#4A1F6B); }
.ast-sidebar-item { color:#D9C9EA; transition:all .15s ease; }
.ast-sidebar-item:hover { background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color:#fff; }
.ast-sidebar-item.active { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E8C874,#C9982E); color:#2E1245; font-weight:700; }

.ast-badge-hijau { background:#E4F5EC; color:#177245; }
.ast-badge-kuning { background:#FDF3DA; color:#8A6300; }
.ast-badge-merah { background:#FBE7E7; color:#B3261E; }
.ast-badge-ungu { background:#F1E7F9; color:#5B2A86; }

.ast-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { width:6px; height:6px; }
.ast-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:#D9C9EA; border-radius:8px; }

.ast-input { border:1.5px solid #E7DCC8; border-radius:12px; padding:9px 14px; font-family:inherit; outline:none; transition:border .15s ease; background:#fff; }
.ast-input:focus { border-color:#6E2C8C; }

.ast-dropzone { border:2px dashed #C9982E; border-radius:18px; background:#FDF8ED; transition: all .15s ease; }
.ast-dropzone.dragover { background:#F7EAC9; border-color:#4A1F6B; }

.ast-fade-in { animation: astFade .35s ease both; }
@keyframes astFade { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(6px);} to {opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);} }

.ast-hover-card { transition: transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease; }
.ast-hover-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(46,18,69,0.14); }

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
.ast-btn, .ast-hover-card, .ast-fade-in { animation:none !important; transition:none !important; }
}
`;

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
MOCK DATA
--------------------------------------------------------- */

const TEACHER = {
name: "Ari Siska Putri, S.Pd.I",
role: "Guru Bahasa Inggris & Bahasa Arab",
school: "SMP As-Said & MA As-Said Pekanbaru",
foundation: "Yayasan Hidayatullah Integral",
};

const CLASS_LIST = [
{ id: "ing7", name: "Bahasa Inggris VII", subject: "Bahasa Inggris", level: "SMP", students: 5, color: "#6E2C8C" },
{ id: "ing8", name: "Bahasa Inggris VIII", subject: "Bahasa Inggris", level: "SMP", students: 4, color: "#4A1F6B" },
{ id: "ing11", name: "Bahasa Inggris XI", subject: "Bahasa Inggris", level: "MA", students: 4, color: "#8A4EA8" },
{ id: "ing12", name: "Bahasa Inggris XII", subject: "Bahasa Inggris", level: "MA", students: 3, color: "#B487C9" },
{ id: "ar11", name: "Bahasa Arab XI", subject: "Bahasa Arab", level: "MA", students: 4, color: "#C9982E" },
{ id: "ar12", name: "Bahasa Arab XII", subject: "Bahasa Arab", level: "MA", students: 3, color: "#E0B860" },
];

const STUDENT_NAMES = {
ing7: ["Ahmad Fadli", "Siti Nur Aisyah", "Muhammad Rizki", "Khadijah Putri", "Yusuf Hakim"],
ing8: ["Fatimah Azzahra", "Abdullah Rasyid", "Nur Hidayah", "Ilham Maulana"],
ing11: ["Zahra Amelia", "Faiz Ramadhan", "Aulia Rahma", "Rafi Firmansyah"],
ing12: ["Salsabila Putri", "Hafizh Ramadhan", "Nayla Safitri"],
ar11: ["Umar Syahid", "Latifah Nur", "Bilal Ahsan", "Maryam Zulfa"],
ar12: ["Hamzah Al Fatih", "Aisyah Ramadhani", "Sulaiman Hafiz"],
};

function buildStudents() {
let idc = 1;
const rows = [];
Object.entries(STUDENT_NAMES).forEach(([classId, names]) => {
names.forEach((name) => {
rows.push({
id: `S${String(idc).padStart(3, "0")}`,
name,
classId,
nis: `2026${String(idc).padStart(4, "0")}`,
gender: idc % 2 === 0 ? "P" : "L",
});
idc++;
});
});
return rows;
}

const INITIAL_STUDENTS = buildStudents();

const INITIAL_MATERIALS = {
ing7: [
{ id: "m1", type: "file", kind: "pdf", title: "Modul Simple Present Tense.pdf" },
{ id: "m2", type: "link", url: "https://youtube.com/watch?v=intro-greetings", title: "Video: Greetings & Introductions" },
],
ar11: [
{ id: "m3", type: "file", kind: "ppt", title: "Qawaid - Isim & Fi'il.pptx" },
{ id: "m4", type: "link", url: "https://drive.google.com/folder/qiraah", title: "Bank Teks Qira'ah" },
],
};

function initGrades(students) {
const g = {};
students.forEach((s) => {
g[s.id] = {
tugas: 75 + ((s.id.charCodeAt(1) * 7) % 20),
quiz: 70 + ((s.id.charCodeAt(2) * 5) % 25),
uts: 78 + ((s.id.charCodeAt(1) * 3) % 15),
uas: 80 + ((s.id.charCodeAt(2) * 2) % 15),
};
});
return g;
}

function todayISO() {
return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
SMALL UI PIECES
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function StarDivider() {
return (
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, margin: "18px 0" }}>
<div style={{ flex: 1, height: 1, background: "#EFE0C4" }} />
<Star size={14} color="#C9982E" fill="#C9982E" />
<div style={{ flex: 1, height: 1, background: "#EFE0C4" }} />
</div>
);
}

function FileIcon({ kind }) {
const map = {
pdf: { Icon: FileText, color: "#B3261E" },
doc: { Icon: FileText, color: "#2A5DB0" },
ppt: { Icon: Presentation, color: "#C9982E" },
xls: { Icon: FileSpreadsheet, color: "#177245" },
img: { Icon: ImageIcon, color: "#8A4EA8" },
video: { Icon: Video, color: "#B3261E" },
audio: { Icon: Music, color: "#4A1F6B" },
};
const { Icon, color } = map[kind] || map.pdf;
return <Icon size={20} color={color} />;
}

function StatCard({ icon, label, value, sub, accent }) {
const Icon = icon;
return (
<div className="ast-card ast-shadow ast-hover-card" style={{ padding: "18px 20px", flex: "1 1 200px", minWidth: 190 }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12 }}>
<div style={{ width: 44, height: 44, borderRadius: 14, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", background: accent + "22" }}>
<Icon size={22} color={accent} />
</div>
<div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 800 }} className="ast-display">{value}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 12.5, color: "#7A6E8C" }}>{label}</div>
</div>
</div>
{sub && <div style={{ marginTop: 10, fontSize: 11.5, color: "#9B8FB0" }}>{sub}</div>}
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
LANDING PAGE
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function Landing({ onLogin, onExplore }) {
return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ minHeight: "100vh", position: "relative", overflow: "hidden" }}>
<div style={{
position: "absolute", inset: 0, zIndex: 0,
background: "radial-gradient(circle at 15% 10%, #4A1F6B22, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(circle at 85% 85%, #C9982E22, transparent 45%)"
}} />
<header style={{ position: "relative", zIndex: 1, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", padding: "20px 40px" }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12 }}>
<img src={LOGO} alt="Logo Yayasan Hidayatullah Integral" style={{ width: 46, height: 46, borderRadius: "50%" }} />
<div>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 15, color: "#2E1245" }}>AS-SAID SMART TEACHER</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#8A7B9E" }}>Yayasan Hidayatullah Integral</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10 }}>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-outline" style={{ padding: "9px 18px", borderRadius: 12, fontSize: 13.5, fontWeight: 600 }} onClick={() => onLogin("guru")}>Login Guru</button>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-primary" style={{ padding: "9px 18px", borderRadius: 12, fontSize: 13.5, fontWeight: 600 }} onClick={() => onLogin("siswa")}>Login Siswa</button>
</div>
</header>

<main style={{ position: "relative", zIndex: 1, maxWidth: 1080, margin: "0 auto", padding: "50px 40px 80px", textAlign: "center" }}>
<div style={{ display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, background: "#F1E7F9", color: "#5B2A86", padding: "6px 16px", borderRadius: 999, fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 28 }}>
<Star size={13} fill="#5B2A86" /> Digital Learning Platform for Smart, Active &amp; Character-Based Students
</div>

<h1 className="ast-display" style={{ fontSize: "clamp(34px,5vw,58px)", fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1.08, color: "#241534", margin: 0 }}>
Ruang belajar digital untuk<br />
<span style={{ background: "linear-gradient(135deg,#4A1F6B,#C9982E)", WebkitBackgroundClip: "text", WebkitTextFillColor: "transparent" }}>
guru &amp; siswa As-Said
</span>
</h1>
<p style={{ maxWidth: 560, margin: "20px auto 0", color: "#6B5E80", fontSize: 16, lineHeight: 1.6 }}>
Satu platform untuk kelas, materi, tugas, nilai, dan absensi — dibangun untuk SMP &amp; MA As-Said Pekanbaru di bawah Yayasan Hidayatullah Integral.
</p>

<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 14, justifyContent: "center", marginTop: 34, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-primary" style={{ padding: "13px 26px", borderRadius: 14, fontSize: 14.5, fontWeight: 700, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }} onClick={() => onLogin("guru")}>
<KeyRound size={17} /> Login Guru
</button>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-gold" style={{ padding: "13px 26px", borderRadius: 14, fontSize: 14.5, fontWeight: 700, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }} onClick={() => onLogin("siswa")}>
<GraduationCap size={17} /> Login Siswa
</button>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-outline" style={{ padding: "13px 26px", borderRadius: 14, fontSize: 14.5, fontWeight: 700, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }} onClick={onExplore}>
<BookOpen size={17} /> Jelajah Kelas
</button>
</div>

<StarDivider />

<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ padding: "26px 30px", textAlign: "left", display: "flex", gap: 20, alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap", marginTop: 10 }}>
<div style={{ width: 64, height: 64, borderRadius: "50%", background: "linear-gradient(135deg,#4A1F6B,#8A4EA8)", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 22 }} className="ast-display">
AS
</div>
<div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 220 }}>
<div style={{ fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 16 }}>{TEACHER.name}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#7A6E8C" }}>{TEACHER.role}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "#9B8FB0", marginTop: 2 }}>{TEACHER.foundation} · {TEACHER.school}</div>
</div>
<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 22 }}>
<div style={{ textAlign: "center" }}>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 20, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>{CLASS_LIST.length}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#9B8FB0" }}>Kelas</div>
</div>
<div style={{ textAlign: "center" }}>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 20, color: "#C9982E" }}>{INITIAL_STUDENTS.length}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#9B8FB0" }}>Siswa</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</main>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
LOGIN
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function Login({ role, onBack, onSuccess }) {
const [step, setStep] = useState("form");
const isGuru = role === "guru";
return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ minHeight: "100vh", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", padding: 20 }}>
<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ width: 380, padding: "34px 30px" }}>
<button onClick={onBack} className="ast-btn" style={{ background: "none", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, color: "#8A7B9E", fontSize: 13, padding: 0, marginBottom: 18 }}>
<ChevronLeft size={16} /> Kembali
</button>
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, marginBottom: 6 }}>
<img src={LOGO} alt="Logo" style={{ width: 34, height: 34, borderRadius: "50%" }} />
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 15 }}>AS-SAID SMART TEACHER</div>
</div>
<h2 className="ast-display" style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, margin: "14px 0 4px" }}>
Masuk sebagai {isGuru ? "Guru" : "Siswa"}
</h2>
<p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#8A7B9E", margin: "0 0 22px" }}>
{isGuru ? "Kelola kelas, materi, nilai, dan absensi Anda." : "Akses kelas, materi, dan perkembangan belajarmu."}
</p>

<label style={{ fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 600, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>{isGuru ? "Email Guru" : "NIS Siswa"}</label>
<input className="ast-input" style={{ width: "100%", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 14, boxSizing: "border-box" }}
defaultValue={isGuru ? "arisiska.putri@assaid.sch.id" : "20260001"} />
<label style={{ fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 600, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>Kata Sandi</label>
<input type="password" className="ast-input" style={{ width: "100%", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 22, boxSizing: "border-box" }} defaultValue="••••••••" />

<button
className="ast-btn ast-btn-primary"
style={{ width: "100%", padding: "12px 0", borderRadius: 12, fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 14 }}
onClick={() => onSuccess(role)}
>
Masuk Dashboard
</button>
<div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#B0A5C2", textAlign: "center", marginTop: 14 }}>
Prototipe demo — klik "Masuk" langsung menampilkan dashboard {isGuru ? "guru" : "siswa"}.
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
SIDEBAR + SHELL
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function Sidebar({ role, active, setActive, onLogout, mobileOpen, setMobileOpen }) {
const guruMenu = [
{ id: "dashboard", label: "Dashboard", icon: Home },
{ id: "siswa", label: "Data Siswa", icon: Users },
{ id: "kelas", label: "Kelas", icon: School },
{ id: "materi", label: "Materi", icon: BookOpen },
{ id: "nilai", label: "Nilai", icon: BarChart3 },
{ id: "absensi", label: "Absensi", icon: CalendarCheck },
];
const siswaMenu = [
{ id: "dashboard", label: "Dashboard", icon: Home },
{ id: "kelas", label: "Kelas Saya", icon: School },
{ id: "materi", label: "Materi", icon: BookOpen },
{ id: "nilai", label: "Nilai", icon: BarChart3 },
{ id: "absensi", label: "Absensi", icon: CalendarCheck },
];
const menu = role === "guru" ? guruMenu : siswaMenu;

return (
<div className="ast-sidebar" style={{
width: 232, minHeight: "100vh", padding: "24px 16px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column",
position: mobileOpen ? "fixed" : "sticky", top: 0, left: 0, zIndex: 40,
transform: mobileOpen ? "translateX(0)" : undefined,
}}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, padding: "0 8px 20px" }}>
<img src={LOGO} alt="Logo" style={{ width: 36, height: 36, borderRadius: "50%" }} />
<div>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ color: "#fff", fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 13.5, lineHeight: 1.2 }}>AS-SAID<br />SMART TEACHER</div>
</div>
</div>
<div style={{ flex: 1, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 4 }}>
{menu.map((m) => {
const Icon = m.icon;
return (
<button key={m.id} onClick={() => { setActive(m.id); setMobileOpen(false); }}
className={`ast-btn ast-sidebar-item ${active === m.id ? "active" : ""}`}
style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 11, padding: "10px 14px", borderRadius: 12, fontSize: 13.5, textAlign: "left" }}>
<Icon size={17} /> {m.label}
</button>
);
})}
</div>
<button onClick={onLogout} className="ast-btn"
style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, padding: "10px 14px", borderRadius: 12, fontSize: 13.5, color: "#E8C0C0", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>
<LogOut size={16} /> Keluar
</button>
</div>
);
}

function Topbar({ title, subtitle, user, setMobileOpen }) {
return (
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", padding: "20px 28px", borderBottom: "1px solid #F0E8D8", background: "#FBF8F3", position: "sticky", top: 0, zIndex: 10 }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12 }}>
<button className="ast-btn" style={{ background: "none", display: "none" }} onClick={() => setMobileOpen(true)}><MenuIcon /></button>
<div>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 20 }}>{title}</div>
{subtitle && <div style={{ fontSize: 12.5, color: "#8A7B9E" }}>{subtitle}</div>}
</div>
</div>
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10 }}>
<div style={{ textAlign: "right" }}>
<div style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700 }}>{user.name}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#9B8FB0" }}>{user.subtitle}</div>
</div>
<div style={{ width: 38, height: 38, borderRadius: "50%", background: "linear-gradient(135deg,#4A1F6B,#8A4EA8)", color: "#fff", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 13 }} className="ast-display">
{user.name.split(" ").map((w) => w[0]).slice(0, 2).join("")}
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
TEACHER: DASHBOARD
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function GuruDashboard({ students, grades, attendance }) {
const avgNilai = useMemo(() => {
const vals = Object.values(grades).map((g) => (g.tugas + g.quiz + g.uts + g.uas) / 4);
return vals.length ? Math.round(vals.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / vals.length) : 0;
}, [grades]);

const attendanceRate = useMemo(() => {
const all = Object.values(attendance).flatMap((d) => Object.values(d));
if (!all.length) return 96;
const hadir = all.filter((s) => s === "Hadir").length;
return Math.round((hadir / all.length) * 100);
}, [attendance]);

const nilaiPerKelas = CLASS_LIST.map((c) => {
const ids = students.filter((s) => s.classId === c.id).map((s) => s.id);
const vals = ids.map((id) => grades[id] ? (grades[id].tugas + grades[id].quiz + grades[id].uts + grades[id].uas) / 4 : 0);
return { name: c.name.replace("Bahasa ", ""), nilai: vals.length ? Math.round(vals.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / vals.length) : 0 };
});

const pieData = [
{ name: "Hadir", value: 88, color: "#177245" },
{ name: "Izin", value: 6, color: "#8A6300" },
{ name: "Sakit", value: 4, color: "#5B2A86" },
{ name: "Alpha", value: 2, color: "#B3261E" },
];

return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ padding: 28, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 22 }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 16, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
<StatCard icon={Users} label="Jumlah Siswa" value={students.length} accent="#4A1F6B" sub="Terdaftar aktif" />
<StatCard icon={School} label="Jumlah Kelas" value={CLASS_LIST.length} accent="#C9982E" sub="2 mapel diampu" />
<StatCard icon={BookOpen} label="Materi Aktif" value={Object.values(INITIAL_MATERIALS).flat().length} accent="#8A4EA8" sub="Tersedia untuk siswa" />
<StatCard icon={TrendingUp} label="Rata-rata Nilai" value={avgNilai} accent="#177245" sub="Seluruh kelas" />
<StatCard icon={CalendarCheck} label="Kehadiran" value={attendanceRate + "%"} accent="#B3261E" sub="30 hari terakhir" />
</div>

<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 20, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ flex: "2 1 420px", padding: 22 }}>
<div style={{ fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 14, fontSize: 14.5 }}>Rata-rata Nilai per Kelas</div>
<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={230}>
<BarChart data={nilaiPerKelas}>
<CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#F0E8D8" />
<XAxis dataKey="name" tick={{ fontSize: 11, fill: "#8A7B9E" }} />
<YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 11, fill: "#8A7B9E" }} domain={[0, 100]} />
<Tooltip />
<Bar dataKey="nilai" fill="#6E2C8C" radius={[8, 8, 0, 0]} />
</BarChart>
</ResponsiveContainer>
</div>
<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ flex: "1 1 260px", padding: 22 }}>
<div style={{ fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 14, fontSize: 14.5 }}>Distribusi Kehadiran</div>
<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={230}>
<PieChart>
<Pie data={pieData} dataKey="value" nameKey="name" innerRadius={45} outerRadius={75} paddingAngle={3}>
{pieData.map((d, i) => <Cell key={i} fill={d.color} />)}
</Pie>
<Tooltip />
</PieChart>
</ResponsiveContainer>
<div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 10, marginTop: 6, justifyContent: "center" }}>
{pieData.map((d) => (
<div key={d.name} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 5, fontSize: 11.5, color: "#7A6E8C" }}>
<span style={{ width: 9, height: 9, borderRadius: 3, background: d.color, display: "inline-block" }} /> {d.name}
</div>
))}
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
TEACHER: DATA SISWA (CRUD)
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function DataSiswa({ students, setStudents }) {
const [query, setQuery] = useState("");
const [filterClass, setFilterClass] = useState("all");
const [showAdd, setShowAdd] = useState(false);
const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: "", classId: CLASS_LIST[0].id, gender: "L" });

const filtered = students.filter((s) =>
(filterClass === "all" || s.classId === filterClass) &&
s.name.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())
);

function addStudent() {
if (!form.name.trim()) return;
const nextIdNum = students.length + 1;
setStudents([...students, {
id: `S${String(nextIdNum).padStart(3, "0")}-${Date.now() % 1000}`,
name: form.name.trim(), classId: form.classId, gender: form.gender,
nis: `2026${String(nextIdNum).padStart(4, "0")}`,
}]);
setForm({ name: "", classId: CLASS_LIST[0].id, gender: "L" });
setShowAdd(false);
}

function removeStudent(id) {
setStudents(students.filter((s) => s.id !== id));
}

return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ padding: 28 }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: 18 }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
<div style={{ position: "relative" }}>
<Search size={15} color="#B0A5C2" style={{ position: "absolute", left: 12, top: 10 }} />
<input className="ast-input" placeholder="Cari nama siswa..." value={query} onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)} style={{ paddingLeft: 34, width: 220 }} />
</div>
<select className="ast-input" value={filterClass} onChange={(e) => setFilterClass(e.target.value)}>
<option value="all">Semua Kelas</option>
{CLASS_LIST.map((c) => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>)}
</select>
</div>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-primary" style={{ padding: "10px 18px", borderRadius: 12, fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 13, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }} onClick={() => setShowAdd(true)}>
<Plus size={16} /> Tambah Siswa
</button>
</div>

<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ overflow: "hidden" }}>
<div style={{ overflowX: "auto" }} className="ast-scrollbar">
<table style={{ width: "100%", borderCollapse: "collapse", fontSize: 13.5 }}>
<thead>
<tr style={{ background: "#F7F1E4", textAlign: "left" }}>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>NIS</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>Nama</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>Kelas</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>L/P</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
{filtered.map((s) => {
const cls = CLASS_LIST.find((c) => c.id === s.classId);
return (
<tr key={s.id} style={{ borderTop: "1px solid #F3ECDC" }}>
<td style={{ padding: "11px 18px", color: "#8A7B9E" }}>{s.nis}</td>
<td style={{ padding: "11px 18px", fontWeight: 600 }}>{s.name}</td>
<td style={{ padding: "11px 18px" }}>
<span className="ast-badge-ungu" style={{ padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: 999, fontSize: 11.5, fontWeight: 700 }}>{cls?.name}</span>
</td>
<td style={{ padding: "11px 18px" }}>{s.gender}</td>
<td style={{ padding: "11px 18px", textAlign: "right" }}>
<button className="ast-btn" style={{ background: "none", color: "#B3261E" }} onClick={() => removeStudent(s.id)}><X size={16} /></button>
</td>
</tr>
);
})}
{filtered.length === 0 && (
<tr><td colSpan={5} style={{ padding: 28, textAlign: "center", color: "#B0A5C2" }}>Tidak ada siswa yang cocok.</td></tr>
)}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>

{showAdd && (
<div style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, background: "#2E124580", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", zIndex: 50 }} onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)}>
<div className="ast-card ast-fade-in" style={{ width: 360, padding: 26 }} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginBottom: 16 }}>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 17 }}>Tambah Siswa</div>
<button className="ast-btn" style={{ background: "none" }} onClick={() => setShowAdd(false)}><X size={18} /></button>
</div>
<label style={{ fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 600, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>Nama Lengkap</label>
<input className="ast-input" style={{ width: "100%", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 12, boxSizing: "border-box" }} value={form.name} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, name: e.target.value })} />
<label style={{ fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 600, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>Kelas</label>
<select className="ast-input" style={{ width: "100%", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 12 }} value={form.classId} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, classId: e.target.value })}>
{CLASS_LIST.map((c) => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>)}
</select>
<label style={{ fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 600, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>Jenis Kelamin</label>
<select className="ast-input" style={{ width: "100%", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 20 }} value={form.gender} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, gender: e.target.value })}>
<option value="L">Laki-laki</option>
<option value="P">Perempuan</option>
</select>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-primary" style={{ width: "100%", padding: "11px 0", borderRadius: 12, fontWeight: 700 }} onClick={addStudent}>Simpan</button>
</div>
</div>
)}
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
TEACHER: KELAS (list -> select)
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function KelasList({ students, onSelect, role }) {
return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ padding: 28 }}>
<div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr))", gap: 18 }}>
{CLASS_LIST.map((c) => {
const count = students.filter((s) => s.classId === c.id).length;
return (
<div key={c.id} onClick={() => onSelect(c.id)} className="ast-card ast-shadow ast-hover-card" style={{ padding: 20, cursor: "pointer", borderTop: `4px solid ${c.color}` }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between" }}>
<span className="ast-badge-ungu" style={{ padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: 999, fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700 }}>{c.level}</span>
<School size={18} color={c.color} />
</div>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 16.5, marginTop: 14 }}>{c.name}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 12.5, color: "#8A7B9E", marginTop: 4 }}>{c.subject}</div>
<div style={{ marginTop: 16, fontSize: 12.5, color: "#9B8FB0" }}>{count} siswa {role === "guru" ? "· klik untuk kelola" : "· klik untuk buka"}</div>
</div>
);
})}
</div>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
TEACHER: MATERI (drag & drop + link)
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function linkMeta(url) {
if (/youtube|youtu\.be/i.test(url)) return { label: "Video Pembelajaran", Icon: Video, color: "#B3261E" };
if (/drive\.google/i.test(url)) return { label: "Google Drive", Icon: FileText, color: "#177245" };
if (/canva/i.test(url)) return { label: "Canva", Icon: Presentation, color: "#5B2A86" };
return { label: "Tautan Artikel", Icon: ExternalLink, color: "#4A1F6B" };
}

function guessKind(filename) {
const ext = filename.split(".").pop().toLowerCase();
if (ext === "pdf") return "pdf";
if (["doc", "docx"].includes(ext)) return "doc";
if (["ppt", "pptx"].includes(ext)) return "ppt";
if (["xls", "xlsx"].includes(ext)) return "xls";
if (["jpg", "jpeg", "png", "gif"].includes(ext)) return "img";
if (["mp4", "mov", "avi"].includes(ext)) return "video";
if (["mp3", "wav"].includes(ext)) return "audio";
return "pdf";
}

function Materi({ materials, setMaterials, students, role, forcedClass }) {
const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState(forcedClass || CLASS_LIST[0].id);
const [dragOver, setDragOver] = useState(false);
const [showLink, setShowLink] = useState(false);
const [linkUrl, setLinkUrl] = useState("");
const [linkTitle, setLinkTitle] = useState("");

const list = materials[selectedClass] || [];

function handleDrop(e) {
e.preventDefault();
setDragOver(false);
const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files || []);
if (!files.length) return;
const newItems = files.map((f, i) => ({ id: `m-${Date.now()}-${i}`, type: "file", kind: guessKind(f.name), title: f.name }));
setMaterials({ ...materials, [selectedClass]: [...(materials[selectedClass] || []), ...newItems] });
}

function addLink() {
if (!linkUrl.trim()) return;
const item = { id: `m-${Date.now()}`, type: "link", url: linkUrl.trim(), title: linkTitle.trim() || linkMeta(linkUrl).label };
setMaterials({ ...materials, [selectedClass]: [...(materials[selectedClass] || []), item] });
setLinkUrl(""); setLinkTitle(""); setShowLink(false);
}

return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ padding: 28 }}>
{!forcedClass && (
<select className="ast-input" style={{ marginBottom: 20 }} value={selectedClass} onChange={(e) => setSelectedClass(e.target.value)}>
{CLASS_LIST.map((c) => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>)}
</select>
)}

{role === "guru" && (
<div
className={`ast-dropzone ${dragOver ? "dragover" : ""}`}
onDragOver={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); setDragOver(true); }}
onDragLeave={() => setDragOver(false)}
onDrop={handleDrop}
style={{ padding: "30px 20px", textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 20 }}
>
<UploadCloud size={30} color="#C9982E" style={{ margin: "0 auto 8px" }} />
<div style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 14 }}>Tarik &amp; lepas file di sini untuk mengunggah</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "#9B8FB0", marginTop: 4 }}>PDF · Word · PowerPoint · Excel · Gambar · Video · Audio</div>
<div style={{ marginTop: 14, display: "flex", gap: 10, justifyContent: "center", flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
<label className="ast-btn ast-btn-primary" style={{ padding: "9px 16px", borderRadius: 10, fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 700, cursor: "pointer" }}>
Pilih File
<input type="file" multiple style={{ display: "none" }} onChange={(e) => handleDrop({ preventDefault: () => {}, dataTransfer: { files: e.target.files } })} />
</label>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-outline" style={{ padding: "9px 16px", borderRadius: 10, fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 700, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }} onClick={() => setShowLink(true)}>
<Link2 size={14} /> Tambah Link
</button>
</div>
</div>
)}

<div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr))", gap: 14 }}>
{list.map((m) => {
if (m.type === "file") {
return (
<div key={m.id} className="ast-card ast-shadow ast-hover-card" style={{ padding: 16, display: "flex", gap: 12, alignItems: "center" }}>
<div style={{ width: 40, height: 40, borderRadius: 10, background: "#F7F1E4", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center" }}>
<FileIcon kind={m.kind} />
</div>
<div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
<div style={{ fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 13, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>{m.title}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#9B8FB0" }}>File pembelajaran</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
const meta = linkMeta(m.url);
const Icon = meta.Icon;
return (
<div key={m.id} className="ast-card ast-shadow ast-hover-card" style={{ padding: 16, display: "flex", gap: 12, alignItems: "center" }}>
<div style={{ width: 40, height: 40, borderRadius: 10, background: meta.color + "1a", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center" }}>
<Icon size={19} color={meta.color} />
</div>
<div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
<div style={{ fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 13, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>{m.title}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: meta.color }}>{meta.label} · klik untuk membuka</div>
</div>
</div>
);
})}
{list.length === 0 && (
<div style={{ gridColumn: "1/-1", textAlign: "center", padding: 30, color: "#B0A5C2", fontSize: 13.5 }}>Belum ada materi untuk kelas ini.</div>
)}
</div>

{showLink && (
<div style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, background: "#2E124580", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", zIndex: 50 }} onClick={() => setShowLink(false)}>
<div className="ast-card ast-fade-in" style={{ width: 380, padding: 26 }} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginBottom: 16 }}>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 17 }}>Tambahkan Link</div>
<button className="ast-btn" style={{ background: "none" }} onClick={() => setShowLink(false)}><X size={18} /></button>
</div>
<label style={{ fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 600, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>URL (YouTube, Drive, Canva, Artikel)</label>
<input className="ast-input" style={{ width: "100%", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 12, boxSizing: "border-box" }} placeholder="https://..." value={linkUrl} onChange={(e) => setLinkUrl(e.target.value)} />
<label style={{ fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 600, color: "#4A1F6B" }}>Judul (opsional)</label>
<input className="ast-input" style={{ width: "100%", marginTop: 6, marginBottom: 20, boxSizing: "border-box" }} value={linkTitle} onChange={(e) => setLinkTitle(e.target.value)} />
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-primary" style={{ width: "100%", padding: "11px 0", borderRadius: 12, fontWeight: 700 }} onClick={addLink}>Simpan Link</button>
</div>
</div>
)}
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
TEACHER: NILAI (spreadsheet style)
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function weightedFinal(g) {
if (!g) return 0;
return Math.round(g.tugas * 0.2 + g.quiz * 0.2 + g.uts * 0.3 + g.uas * 0.3);
}

function NilaiView({ students, grades, setGrades, forcedClass, studentId }) {
const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState(forcedClass || CLASS_LIST[0].id);
const rows = students.filter((s) => s.classId === selectedClass && (!studentId || s.id === studentId));

function updateGrade(id, field, value) {
const v = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(value) || 0));
setGrades({ ...grades, [id]: { ...grades[id], [field]: v } });
}

return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ padding: 28 }}>
{!forcedClass && (
<select className="ast-input" style={{ marginBottom: 20 }} value={selectedClass} onChange={(e) => setSelectedClass(e.target.value)}>
{CLASS_LIST.map((c) => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>)}
</select>
)}
<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ overflow: "hidden" }}>
<div style={{ overflowX: "auto" }} className="ast-scrollbar">
<table style={{ width: "100%", borderCollapse: "collapse", fontSize: 13.5 }}>
<thead>
<tr style={{ background: "#F7F1E4", textAlign: "left" }}>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>Nama</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>Tugas (20%)</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>Quiz (20%)</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>UTS (30%)</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>UAS (30%)</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>Nilai Akhir</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
{rows.map((s) => {
const g = grades[s.id];
const final = weightedFinal(g);
const badge = final >= 85 ? "ast-badge-hijau" : final >= 75 ? "ast-badge-kuning" : "ast-badge-merah";
return (
<tr key={s.id} style={{ borderTop: "1px solid #F3ECDC" }}>
<td style={{ padding: "9px 18px", fontWeight: 600 }}>{s.name}</td>
{["tugas", "quiz", "uts", "uas"].map((f) => (
<td key={f} style={{ padding: "6px 18px" }}>
{studentId ? (
<span>{g?.[f]}</span>
) : (
<input className="ast-input" style={{ width: 62, padding: "6px 8px" }} type="number" value={g?.[f] ?? 0} onChange={(e) => updateGrade(s.id, f, e.target.value)} />
)}
</td>
))}
<td style={{ padding: "9px 18px" }}>
<span className={badge} style={{ padding: "3px 12px", borderRadius: 999, fontWeight: 700 }}>{final}</span>
</td>
</tr>
);
})}
{rows.length === 0 && <tr><td colSpan={6} style={{ padding: 28, textAlign: "center", color: "#B0A5C2" }}>Belum ada data siswa di kelas ini.</td></tr>}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
TEACHER: ABSENSI
--------------------------------------------------------- */

const STATUS_OPTS = [
{ key: "Hadir", color: "#177245", bg: "#E4F5EC" },
{ key: "Izin", color: "#8A6300", bg: "#FDF3DA" },
{ key: "Sakit", color: "#5B2A86", bg: "#F1E7F9" },
{ key: "Alpha", color: "#B3261E", bg: "#FBE7E7" },
];

function Absensi({ students, attendance, setAttendance, forcedClass, studentId }) {
const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState(forcedClass || CLASS_LIST[0].id);
const [date, setDate] = useState(todayISO());
const rows = students.filter((s) => s.classId === selectedClass && (!studentId || s.id === studentId));
const dayData = attendance[date] || {};

function mark(id, status) {
setAttendance({ ...attendance, [date]: { ...dayData, [id]: status } });
}

const summary = STATUS_OPTS.map((opt) => ({
...opt,
count: rows.filter((s) => (dayData[s.id] || "Hadir") === opt.key).length,
}));

return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ padding: 28 }}>
<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap", marginBottom: 18 }}>
{!forcedClass && (
<select className="ast-input" value={selectedClass} onChange={(e) => setSelectedClass(e.target.value)}>
{CLASS_LIST.map((c) => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</option>)}
</select>
)}
{!studentId && <input type="date" className="ast-input" value={date} onChange={(e) => setDate(e.target.value)} />}
</div>

<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap", marginBottom: 18 }}>
{summary.map((s) => (
<div key={s.key} style={{ background: s.bg, color: s.color, borderRadius: 12, padding: "10px 16px", fontSize: 12.5, fontWeight: 700, flex: "1 1 100px", textAlign: "center" }}>
{s.count} {s.key}
</div>
))}
</div>

<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ overflow: "hidden" }}>
<div style={{ overflowX: "auto" }} className="ast-scrollbar">
<table style={{ width: "100%", borderCollapse: "collapse", fontSize: 13.5 }}>
<thead>
<tr style={{ background: "#F7F1E4", textAlign: "left" }}>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>Nama</th>
<th style={{ padding: "12px 18px" }}>{studentId ? "Status" : "Tandai Kehadiran"}</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
{rows.map((s) => {
const cur = dayData[s.id] || "Hadir";
return (
<tr key={s.id} style={{ borderTop: "1px solid #F3ECDC" }}>
<td style={{ padding: "10px 18px", fontWeight: 600 }}>{s.name}</td>
<td style={{ padding: "10px 18px" }}>
{studentId ? (
<span style={{ color: STATUS_OPTS.find((o) => o.key === cur)?.color, fontWeight: 700 }}>{cur}</span>
) : (
<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
{STATUS_OPTS.map((o) => (
<button key={o.key} onClick={() => mark(s.id, o.key)} className="ast-btn"
style={{
padding: "5px 12px", borderRadius: 999, fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700,
background: cur === o.key ? o.color : o.bg, color: cur === o.key ? "#fff" : o.color,
border: cur === o.key ? `1.5px solid ${o.color}` : "1.5px solid transparent",
}}>
{cur === o.key && <Check size={11} style={{ marginRight: 3, marginBottom: -1 }} />}
{o.key}
</button>
))}
</div>
)}
</td>
</tr>
);
})}
{rows.length === 0 && <tr><td colSpan={2} style={{ padding: 28, textAlign: "center", color: "#B0A5C2" }}>Belum ada data siswa di kelas ini.</td></tr>}
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
STUDENT DASHBOARD HOME
--------------------------------------------------------- */

function SiswaDashboard({ student, grades, attendance, setActive }) {
const g = grades[student.id];
const final = weightedFinal(g);
const cls = CLASS_LIST.find((c) => c.id === student.classId);
const allDates = Object.keys(attendance);
const hadirCount = allDates.filter((d) => (attendance[d][student.id] || "Hadir") === "Hadir").length;
const rate = allDates.length ? Math.round((hadirCount / allDates.length) * 100) : 97;

const trend = [
{ name: "Tugas", nilai: g?.tugas || 0 },
{ name: "Quiz", nilai: g?.quiz || 0 },
{ name: "UTS", nilai: g?.uts || 0 },
{ name: "UAS", nilai: g?.uas || 0 },
];

return (
<div className="ast-fade-in" style={{ padding: 28, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 22 }}>
<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ padding: 24, display: "flex", gap: 18, alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
<div style={{ width: 60, height: 60, borderRadius: "50%", background: "linear-gradient(135deg,#4A1F6B,#8A4EA8)", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", color: "#fff", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 20 }} className="ast-display">
{student.name.split(" ").map((w) => w[0]).slice(0, 2).join("")}
</div>
<div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 200 }}>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 18 }}>{student.name}</div>
<div style={{ fontSize: 12.5, color: "#8A7B9E" }}>{cls?.name} · NIS {student.nis}</div>
</div>
<button className="ast-btn ast-btn-outline" style={{ padding: "9px 16px", borderRadius: 10, fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 12.5 }} onClick={() => setActive("kelas")}>Lihat Kelas Saya</button>
</div>

<div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 16, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
<StatCard icon={Award} label="Nilai Akhir" value={final} accent="#177245" sub="Rata-rata tertimbang" />
<StatCard icon={CalendarCheck} label="Kehadiran" value={rate + "%"} accent="#B3261E" sub="Sepanjang semester" />
<StatCard icon={BookOpen} label="Materi Tersedia" value={(INITIAL_MATERIALS[student.classId] || []).length} accent="#C9982E" sub="Untuk kelasmu" />
</div>

<div className="ast-card ast-shadow" style={{ padding: 22 }}>
<div style={{ fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 14, fontSize: 14.5 }}>Perkembangan Komponen Nilai</div>
<ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
<LineChart data={trend}>
<CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#F0E8D8" />
<XAxis dataKey="name" tick={{ fontSize: 11.5, fill: "#8A7B9E" }} />
<YAxis domain={[0, 100]} tick={{ fontSize: 11.5, fill: "#8A7B9E" }} />
<Tooltip />
<Line type="monotone" dataKey="nilai" stroke="#C9982E" strokeWidth={3} dot={{ r: 4, fill: "#4A1F6B" }} />
</LineChart>
</ResponsiveContainer>
</div>
</div>
);
}

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
APP ROOT
--------------------------------------------------------- */

export default function App() {
const [view, setView] = useState("landing"); // landing | login | app
const [role, setRole] = useState("guru");
const [active, setActive] = useState("dashboard");
const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false);
const [selectedClass, setSelectedClass] = useState(null);

const [students, setStudents] = useState(INITIAL_STUDENTS);
const [materials, setMaterials] = useState(INITIAL_MATERIALS);
const [grades, setGrades] = useState(() => initGrades(INITIAL_STUDENTS));
const [attendance, setAttendance] = useState({ [todayISO()]: {} });

const demoStudent = students.find((s) => s.classId === "ing7") || students[0];

function handleLogin(r) {
setRole(r);
setView("login");
}
function handleLoginSuccess(r) {
setRole(r);
setView("app");
setActive("dashboard");
}
function handleLogout() {
setView("landing");
setActive("dashboard");
setSelectedClass(null);
}

if (view === "landing") {
return (
<div className="ast-root">
<style>{CSS}</style>
<Landing onLogin={handleLogin} onExplore={() => handleLogin("siswa")} />
</div>
);
}
if (view === "login") {
return (
<div className="ast-root">
<style>{CSS}</style>
<Login role={role} onBack={() => setView("landing")} onSuccess={handleLoginSuccess} />
</div>
);
}

const user = role === "guru"
? { name: TEACHER.name, subtitle: "Guru" }
: { name: demoStudent.name, subtitle: CLASS_LIST.find((c) => c.id === demoStudent.classId)?.name };

const titles = {
dashboard: "Dashboard", siswa: "Data Siswa", kelas: "Kelas", materi: "Materi", nilai: "Nilai", absensi: "Absensi",
};

return (
<div className="ast-root">
<style>{CSS}</style>
<div style={{ display: "flex" }}>
<Sidebar role={role} active={active} setActive={(a) => { setActive(a); setSelectedClass(null); }} onLogout={handleLogout} mobileOpen={mobileOpen} setMobileOpen={setMobileOpen} />
<div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
<Topbar title={titles[active]} subtitle={role === "guru" ? TEACHER.school : "Portal Siswa"} user={user} setMobileOpen={setMobileOpen} />

{active === "dashboard" && role === "guru" && <GuruDashboard students={students} grades={grades} attendance={attendance} />}
{active === "dashboard" && role === "siswa" && <SiswaDashboard student={demoStudent} grades={grades} attendance={attendance} setActive={setActive} />}

{active === "siswa" && role === "guru" && <DataSiswa students={students} setStudents={setStudents} />}

{active === "kelas" && !selectedClass && <KelasList students={students} onSelect={setSelectedClass} role={role} />}
{active === "kelas" && selectedClass && (
<div style={{ padding: "20px 28px 0" }}>
<button className="ast-btn" style={{ background: "none", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, color: "#4A1F6B", fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 13 }} onClick={() => setSelectedClass(null)}>
<ChevronLeft size={16} /> Kembali ke daftar kelas
</button>
<div className="ast-display" style={{ fontSize: 19, fontWeight: 700, margin: "10px 0 4px" }}>{CLASS_LIST.find((c) => c.id === selectedClass)?.name}</div>
<StarDivider />
<Materi materials={materials} setMaterials={setMaterials} students={students} role={role} forcedClass={selectedClass} />
</div>
)}

{active === "materi" && <Materi materials={materials} setMaterials={setMaterials} students={students} role={role} />}

{active === "nilai" && <NilaiView students={students} grades={grades} setGrades={setGrades} studentId={role === "siswa" ? demoStudent.id : null} forcedClass={role === "siswa" ? demoStudent.classId : null} />}

{active === "absensi" && <Absensi students={students} attendance={attendance} setAttendance={setAttendance} studentId={role === "siswa" ? demoStudent.id : null} forcedClass={role === "siswa" ? demoStudent.classId : null} />}
</div>
</div>
</div>
);
}
